title: Cobblemon Expeditions
description: Send your Pokémon on timed expeditions to earn loot, XP, and climb the ranks!
body:
# Cobblemon Expeditions

**Send your Pokémon on timed expeditions to earn loot, XP, and climb the ranks!**

Cobblemon Expeditions is a Fabric mod for **Minecraft 1.21.1** that adds an expedition system to **Cobblemon**. Players interact with tiered Expedition Boards to dispatch their PC Pokémon on timed missions. Choose your team wisely — type matchups, IVs, EVs, and environmental hazards all influence your chances of success.

*Required on both client and server.*

---

## ⚔️ Features

- **5 Board Tiers** Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite. Higher tiers unlock harder and more rewarding expeditions as you rank up.
- **Timed Expeditions** Send Pokémon from your PC on missions ranging from minutes to hours. Pokémon are locked while on expedition.
- **TEP System** Team Expedition Power is calculated from type advantages, IVs, EVs, party size, and hazard mitigation.
- **Hazards** Expeditions can feature environmental hazards (heat, cold, toxic, aquatic, etc.) that reduce success chance unless countered by the right Pokémon types.
- **Modes** Switch between expedition modes (e.g., Relic Hunters, Treasure Seekers) for different bonuses and playstyles.
- **Rank Progression** Earn Expedition Rank XP to unlock new tiers, additional expedition slots, and access to harder content.
- **Outcome Tiers** Expeditions resolve as GREAT, SUCCESS, PARTIAL, or FAIL — each with different loot quantities and quality.
- **Pokémon & Player XP** Pokémon gain experience and players earn vanilla XP upon claiming rewards.
- **3×2 Multiblock Boards** Expedition Boards are beautiful 3-wide, 2-tall craftable blocks.
- **Fully Data-Driven** All expeditions, loot tables, modes, and hazards are defined via JSON datapacks and editable in-game through the Admin GUI.
- **In-Game Admin Editor** Operators can create, edit, and delete expeditions, loot tables, modes, and hazards live — no game/server restart required.
- **Highly Configurable** Dozens of config options for TEP calculation, success thresholds, loot scaling, rank progression, anti-abuse, and more.

---

## 🖥️ Board GUI

Right-click an Expedition Board to open the GUI. Browse available expeditions, select Pokémon from your PC, review success chances, and send them off!

![The Board Block interface. we can see the rank of the player, the available expeditions and the available pokemons to send on them. The mouse is hovering on an expedition and it shows a tooltip with more details like Party Size and Rank XP awarded.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f75656c718b16316357aa6b3fb94e347f2c5ffe6.png)

---

## 🛠️ Admin GUI

Operators can open the admin panel to edit expeditions, loot tables, modes, and hazards in real time. All changes are saved to the `config/cobblemon_expeditions/` folder instantly.

![In this image we can see one of the Admin Panel Tabs. Specifically the Loot Tables Tab. That tab shows a list of all the expeditions on the left side, and on the right side we see all the possible loots for the expedition. Users can remove each individual loot by clicking on the cross next to it. They can add new loot (as we can see with the last line being a master ball with a lot of weight). They can modify drop and weight of items, Weight affects the chance of being dropped. The blue button is to easily change block/item reward. On click it will open a View with a search bar and all the items of the modpack, the user can then select which one he wants and it will add it to the loot table.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0f7f7b16f578156b690812a4d64c988f2724a2c.png)

---

## 📋 Commands

| Command | Permission | Description |
|---------|-----------|-------------|
| `/expedition check` | Everyone | List your active expeditions with time remaining, Pokémon count, and success chance. |
| `/expedition rewards` | Everyone | List your pending rewards waiting to be claimed at a board. |
| `/expedition finish <player>` | OP Level 2 | Force-complete all active expeditions for a player instantly. |
| `/expedition reload` | OP Level 2 | Reload the config file from disk without restarting the server. |
| `/expedition xp <player> <amount>` | OP Level 2 | Grant expedition rank XP to a player (triggers rank-ups automatically). |
| `/expedition admin` | OP Level 2 | Open the in-game Admin GUI to edit expeditions, loot tables, modes, and hazards. |

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Install **Fabric Loader** (≥ 0.16.0) for Minecraft 1.21.1
2. Install **Fabric API**, **Fabric Language Kotlin** (≥ 1.13.0), and **Cobblemon** (≥ 1.7.0)
3. Drop the Cobblemon Expeditions jar into your `mods/` folder
